examples: Last year, Andrea's husband, Rick, a miner in Nevada was laid off.
Coal output per miner in Tribnia is double what it was five years ago, even though no new mines have opened.
A miner might be someone who works in a mine.
For marital happiness marry a coal miner, construction worker, oil platform engineer, farmer, etc.
Shell aims to combine coal gasification with gas-to-diesel technology in an alliance with coal miner Anglo American.
